0.original: Our combined carpentry talent equaled zero, and the end product clearly reflected that fact.
0.b1: We had no carpentry skills, and the finished product showed it.
0.cn: 我们完全没有木工天赋，成品清楚地反映了这一点。
0.ai_notes:
'combined': joined together to work as a team.
'equaled zero': a way of saying that there was absolutely no skill or ability.
0.remarks:
'combined': 联合起来像团队一样工作。
'equaled zero': 形容完全没有技能或能力。

1.original: Shortly afterward a good friend stopped by, and upon seeing what we had done,
1.b1: Shortly after, a good friend visited and saw what we had built.
1.cn: 不久之后，一位好朋友顺道拜访，看到我们做的一切时，
1.ai_notes: 'stopped by': to visit someone for a short time without planning it in advance.
1.remarks: 'stopped by': 顺便拜访某人，没有提前计划。

2.original: asked, What's that you've stuck up there among the trees?
2.b1: He asked, "What is that thing you put in the trees?"
2.cn: 他问：“你们挂在树中间的那是什么东西？”
2.ai_notes: 'stuck up': to put something in a place, often in a careless or messy way.
2.remarks: 'stuck up': 把某物贴在某处，通常指随意或凌乱地放置。

3.original: That's not a doghouse, is it?
3.b1: That is not a doghouse, is it?
3.ai_notes: 'doghouse': a small shelter for a dog; being 'in the doghouse' is an idiom meaning to be in trouble with someone.
3.remarks: 'doghouse': 狗窝；'in the doghouse' 是一个习语，意为惹上麻烦。

5.original: Then he pointed out just a few of our mistakes and summed it all up with,
5.b1: He pointed out our mistakes and said:
5.cn: 然后他指出了我们的一些错误，并总结说：
5.ai_notes:
'pointed out': to call attention to a specific detail or mistake.
'summed it all up': to give a short summary of a situation.
5.remarks:
'pointed out': 指出某处细节或错误。
'summed it all up': 对情况进行简要总结。

6.original: Why didn't you get a plan?
6.b1: Why did you not use a plan?
6.cn: 你们为什么不找个设计图呢？
6.ai_notes: 'get a plan': to obtain a set of instructions or a design before starting a project.
6.remarks: 'get a plan': 在开始项目前获得一套说明或设计方案。

7.original: Nobody these days builds a doghouse without a blueprint.
7.b1: Nobody builds a doghouse without a blueprint these days.
7.cn: 现在没人会在没有蓝图的情况下盖狗屋。
7.ai_notes: 'blueprint': a technical drawing for building something; often used metaphorically to mean a detailed plan for success.
7.remarks: 'blueprint': 建筑蓝图；常比喻为成功的详细计划。

8.original: And please, as you visualize your future, don't be afraid to be blue sky.
8.b1: Please, when you think about your future, do not be afraid to dream big.
8.cn: 请在构想未来时，不要害怕拥有宏大的愿景。
8.ai_notes: 'blue sky': in this context, it means to think creatively without limits or to 'dream big'.
8.remarks: 'blue sky': 在此语境下指不受限制地创造性思考或“大胆梦想”。

9.original: People these days are measured by the size of their dreams.
9.b1: People are judged by the size of their dreams.
9.cn: 人们的成就往往取决于他们梦想的大小。
9.ai_notes: 'measured by': to be judged or evaluated based on a specific standard.
9.remarks: 'measured by': 根据特定标准进行评判或评估。

10.original: No one accomplishes more than he sets out to accomplish.
10.b1: No one achieves more than they plan to achieve.
10.cn: 一个人取得的成就不会超过他计划要达到的目标。
10.ai_notes: 'sets out to': to start an activity with a specific goal in mind.
10.remarks: 'sets out to': 带着特定目标开始某项活动。

11.cn: 所以，去构想一个宏大的未来吧。
11.ai_notes: 'visualize': to form a mental image of something you want to happen in the future.
11.remarks: 'visualize': 在脑海中构想出未来想要实现的事物。

12.original: Here is a word-for-word excerpt from the life plan of one of my former trainees.
12.b1: Here is a part of a life plan from one of my former students.
12.cn: 这是我以前的一位学员的人生计划中的一段摘录。
12.ai_notes:
'excerpt': a short piece taken from a longer book, document, or speech.
'trainee': a person who is learning a job or skill.
12.remarks:
'excerpt': 从长篇文章或演讲中摘录的一小段。
'trainee': 正在学习某项工作或技能的人。

13.ai_notes: 'Listen to it': a common way to ask someone to pay close attention to the information being presented.
13.remarks: 'Listen to it': 提醒某人密切关注所呈现的信息的常用说法。

14.original: Note how well this fellow visualized his home future.
14.b1: Notice how well this person planned his future home.
14.cn: 注意这个人是如何清晰地构想他未来的家的。
14.ai_notes: 'fellow': an informal way to refer to a man or a person.
14.remarks: 'fellow': 指代男性或人的非正式说法。

15.original: As he wrote this, it is obvious he really saw himself in the future.
15.b1: It is clear that he really imagined his future.
15.cn: 很明显，他在写这些时，确实在脑海中看到了自己的未来。
15.ai_notes: 'obvious': easy to see or understand; clear.
15.remarks: 'obvious': 容易看到或理解的；清晰的。

16.original: My home goal is to own a country estate.
16.b1: My goal is to own a country house.
16.cn: 我的家庭目标是拥有一处乡村庄园。
16.ai_notes: 'country estate': a large property in the countryside, usually including a big house and land.
16.remarks: 'country estate': 乡村的大型地产，通常包括大房子和土地。

17.original: The house will be of the typical southern manor type, two stories, white columns and all.
17.b1: The house will be a southern style, with two floors and white columns.
17.cn: 房子将是典型的南方庄园风格，两层楼，带有白色圆柱。
17.ai_notes:
'manor': a large, impressive house, often associated with historical wealth.
'and all': an informal phrase used to mean 'and other similar things'.
17.remarks:
'manor': 庄园，通常与历史上的财富有关。
'and all': 非正式短语，意为“以及其他类似的东西”。

18.original: We will have the grounds fenced in, and probably will have a fish pond or two on the place,
18.b1: We will have a fence around the land and maybe a fish pond.
18.cn: 我们会把土地围起来，可能还会建一两个鱼塘，
18.ai_notes:
'grounds': the land surrounding a large house or building.
'on the place': an informal way to refer to the property or land.
18.remarks:
'grounds': 大房子或建筑物周围的土地。
'on the place': 指代该房产或土地的非正式说法。

19.original: as my wife and I both enjoy fishing.
19.b1: because my wife and I both like fishing.
19.cn: 因为我和我妻子都喜欢钓鱼。
19.ai_notes: 'enjoy': to take pleasure in doing something.

20.original: We will keep our Doberman kennels back of the house somewhere.
20.b1: We will keep our Doberman dogs behind the house.
20.cn: 我们会把杜宾犬舍安置在屋后。
20.ai_notes:
'kennels': a place where dogs are kept or bred.
'back of': an informal way to say 'behind'.
20.remarks:
'kennels': 养狗或繁育狗的地方。
'back of': 'behind' 的非正式说法。

21.original: The thing I have always wanted is a long winding driveway with trees lining each side.
21.b1: I have always wanted a long driveway with trees on both sides.
21.cn: 我一直想要一条两旁种满树木的长长车道。
21.ai_notes:
'winding': having many turns or curves.
'lining': to form a row along the edge of something.
21.remarks:
'winding': 有许多转弯或曲线的。
'lining': 沿某物边缘排成一行。

22.original: But a house is not necessarily a home.
22.b1: But a house is not always a home.
22.cn: 但房子并不一定就是家。
22.ai_notes: 'not necessarily': used to say that something is not always true or guaranteed.
22.remarks: 'not necessarily': 用于表示某事并不总是正确的或有保证的。

23.original: I am going to do everything I can to make our house more than just a place to eat and sleep.
23.b1: I will do my best to make our house a real home, not just a place to eat and sleep.
23.cn: 我会尽我所能，让我们的房子不仅仅是一个吃饭睡觉的地方。
23.ai_notes: 'do everything I can': a phrase used to express strong determination to succeed.
23.remarks: 'do everything I can': 用于表达成功决心的短语。

24.original: Of course we do not intend to leave God out of our plans,
24.b1: Of course, we will include God in our plans.
24.cn: 当然，我们打算把上帝也纳入我们的计划中，
24.ai_notes: 'leave out': to not include something or someone.
24.remarks: 'leave out': 不包括某人或某物。

25.original: and throughout the years we will spend a certain amount of time in church activities.
25.b1: We will spend time on church activities over the years.
25.cn: 这些年来，我们会花时间参与教会活动。
25.ai_notes: 'throughout the years': during the whole period of time.
25.remarks: 'throughout the years': 在整个时间段内。

26.original: Ten years from now, I want to be in a position to take a family cruise around the world.
26.b1: In ten years, I want to take my family on a world cruise.
26.cn: 十年后，我希望有能力带全家进行一次环球航行。
26.ai_notes: 'in a position to': to have the money, power, or opportunity to do something.
26.remarks: 'in a position to': 有钱、有权或有机会做某事。

27.original: I would like very much to do this before the family gets scattered all over the world by marriages,
27.b1: I want to do this before the family moves away because of marriage.
27.cn: 我想在家人因为结婚等原因分散到世界各地之前完成这件事。
27.ai_notes: 'scattered': spread out over a wide area.

28.original: etc. If we can't find the time to make the cruise all at once,
28.b1: If we cannot take one long trip,
28.cn: 如果我们无法一次性完成这次航行，
28.ai_notes: 'all at once': at the same time; in one single trip.
28.remarks: 'all at once': 同时；一次性完成。

29.original: we will put it into four or five separate vacations and visit a different part of the world each year.
29.b1: we will take four or five smaller trips and visit different places each year.
29.cn: 我们会把它分成四五次假期，每年去世界不同的地方。
29.ai_notes: 'separate': distinct or individual, not joined together.
29.remarks: 'separate': 独立的或个别的，没有连接在一起。

30.original: Naturally, all these plans in Home Department depend on how well things go in my Work Department,
30.b1: These home plans depend on my work success.
30.cn: 当然，所有这些家庭计划都取决于我在工作上的表现，
30.ai_notes: 'depend on': to be decided or affected by something else.
30.remarks: 'depend on': 由其他事物决定或受其影响。

31.original: so I'll have to keep on the ball if I'm to accomplish all this.
31.b1: so I must work hard to achieve this.
31.cn: 所以我必须全力以赴才能实现这一切。
31.ai_notes: 'keep on the ball': an idiom meaning to stay alert, focused, and efficient.
31.remarks: 'keep on the ball': 习语，意为保持警觉、专注且高效。

32.original: This plan was written five years ago.
32.b1: He wrote this plan five years ago.
32.cn: 这份计划是五年前写的。
32.ai_notes: 'written': the past participle of 'write', used here to describe the plan.
32.remarks: 'written': 'write' 的过去分词，此处用于描述计划。

33.original: The trainee then owned two small dime stores.
33.b1: At that time, he owned two small stores.
33.cn: 当时这位学员拥有两家小型廉价商店。
33.ai_notes: 'dime stores': older American term for stores that sold inexpensive household items; similar to a 'dollar store'.
33.remarks: 'dime stores': 美国旧称，指售卖廉价家居用品的商店；类似于“一元店”。

34.original: Now he owns five, and he has purchased seventeen acres for his country estate.
34.b1: Now he has five stores and a large piece of land for his estate.
34.cn: 现在他拥有五家店，并为他的乡村庄园购买了十七英亩土地。
34.ai_notes:
'purchased': a formal word for 'bought'.
'acres': a unit of measurement for land area.
34.remarks:
'purchased': 'bought' 的正式用词。
'acres': 土地面积单位，英亩。
